title: Nanjundi Kalyana
desc: Raghuchandra changes his identity in order to marry his cousin to settle the family conflict between his father and aunt.

title: Eradu Nakshatragalu
desc: A prince and a poor boy meet by chance and discover that they look exactly alike. They then decide to switch places in order to experience each other's lifestyles.

title: Sneha
desc: Murali saves Lakshmi from an abusive marriage and shelters her at his house. However, all hell breaks loose when Murali's girlfriend finds out about their living situation.

title: Iruvudellava Bittu
desc: Poorvi, an independent woman, leaves her family and boyfriend, Dev, due to her ego and self-conceit. Despite making several imprudent decisions, her life comes back on track after meeting Akash.

title: Ugramm
desc: Agastya, an automobile mechanic with a dangerous past, takes it upon himself to protect Nithya, a kidnapped girl, from the vengeful son of a ruthless gangster.
